injection_points.name: UserCode.kt
injection_points.description: Primary injection target. AI-generated Kotlin code is written here. Must compile standalone.

injection_contract.description: The injected code MUST define an object or class `UserCode` with a suspend fun `run()`. The flow runner will call this method. If no such method exists, the flow will instantiate the class for side-effects and wait for timeout.
injection_contract.fallback_behavior: If no run() method is found, the flow will instantiate UserCode and wait for timeout.

run_generated.description: Generic flow: instantiates the injected UserCode class, calls its run() method, and waits for completion or timeout.
